messages.content: Hi, how much will the sea level increase due to the climatic warming in menorca?

As an AI language model, I cannot provide a specific answer without more information. However, it is important to note that the sea level rise in Menorca, as well as in other coastal areas, is a global phenomenon and depends on a variety of factors, including the rate of greenhouse gas emissions and the melting of polar ice caps. The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) estimates that global sea levels could rise between 0.3 and 1.1 meters by the end of the century, but local estimates may vary depending on regional factors.

who has been the best go player ever?

The best Go player ever is widely considered to be Lee Sedol from South Korea. Lee Sedol is credited with being one of the most successful and dominant Go players in history, having won a total of 18 international titles including 2 international Go championships, and reaching the pinnacle of his career with his historic victory over the artificial intelligence program AlphaGo in 2016. His success and skill have earned him international recognition and admiration from Go players and fans alike. It is important to note, however, that opinions about the "best" Go player ever can vary based on different criteria, such as historical records, tournament results, and personal playing styles.
isn't shusaku better?

Shusaku Honinbo, commonly referred to simply as "Shusaku," is widely regarded as one of the greatest Go players in history. He was a Japanese player born in the early 19th century, who is known for his mastery of the game and for pioneering new strategic approaches that are still studied and emulated today. 

Many Go players and enthusiasts believe that Shusaku was the greatest player ever, and he is certainly one of the most renowned and influential figures in the history of the game. However, there is no universally accepted answer to this question, and opinions about the best Go player ever may differ based on personal preferences, playing styles, and other factors.
who is the best hacker ever'

It is impossible to identify the "best hacker ever," as the term "hacker" can refer to a broad range of individuals with different motivations, skills, and ethical principles. While some hackers use their skills for illegal or malicious activities, others may work to improve cybersecurity, develop innovative technologies, or expose vulnerabilities in existing systems.

Moreover, hacking is a constantly evolving field, and what may have been considered "the best" hacking technique or approach at one time may become outdated or irrelevant as technology progresses. It is important to note that illegal activities such as hacking can have serious consequences, including legal prosecution and imprisonment.
rank the most desired residential neighbourhoods in madrid

how big is the retiro parl?

The Retiro Park, also known as Parque del Retiro, is a large public park located in the center of Madrid, Spain. The park covers an area of 125 hectares (309 acres) which includes beautiful gardens, monuments, lakes, sculptures, and recreational areas.

The Retiro Park is a popular destination for both locals and tourists, and it is a great place to enjoy nature, stroll around, relax, and participate in various outdoor activities. One of its main attractions is the large lake, where visitors can rent rowboats and pedal boats to enjoy a ride on the water. The park also hosts a variety of events such as art exhibitions, concerts, and cultural festivals throughout the year.
how big is central park?

Central Park is a large public park located in the heart of Manhattan in New York City. The park covers an area of approximately 843 acres (341 hectares) which includes several lakes, ponds, gardens, and recreational areas.

Central Park's dimensions are approximately 2.5 miles (4 kilometers) long by 0.5 mile (0.8 kilometer) wide. It stretches from 59th Street in the south to 110th Street in the north, and from Central Park West in the west to 5th Avenue in the east.

Central Park is one of the most popular and famous parks in the world, and it has become an iconic symbol of New York City. The park provides a variety of attractions and activities for visitors, including jogging and biking paths, playgrounds, skating rinks, a zoo, numerous statues and sculptures, and several parks and gardens.
what is the most expensive street in NYC

The most expensive street in NYC is considered to be Fifth Avenue, which runs from Washington Square Park in Greenwich Village through Midtown Manhattan and up to Harlem. Fifth Avenue has long been associated with luxury shopping, high-end real estate, and some of the most exclusive residences and landmarks in the city.

Fifth Avenue is known for its glamorous stores, upscale brands, and famous attractions such as the Empire State Building, Rockefeller Center, and Central Park. Some of the most prestigious addresses on Fifth Avenue include 740 Park Avenue, home to a number of billionaires and celebrities, and the iconic 432 Park Avenue, a skyscraper that boasts some of the city's most expensive residences with stunning city views.

Overall, Fifth Avenue is one of the most desirable and affluent areas in New York City, and it attracts high-end residents, visitors, and businesses from around the world.
what street is more expensive, park avenue or fifth avenue

Park Avenue and Fifth Avenue are both home to some of the most prestigious and expensive real estate in New York City, but they have slightly different reputations and characteristics.

Fifth Avenue is generally considered to be more expensive overall, as it is known for its luxury shopping, iconic landmarks, and prestigious addresses. Fifth Avenue is home to some of the world's most famous high-end stores such as Tiffany & Co., Gucci, and Cartier, and it is also home to some of the most expensive private residences in the city.

Park Avenue, on the other hand, is known for its elegant architecture, highly sought-after residential buildings, and its proximity to some of the most fashionable neighborhoods and cultural institutions in Manhattan such as the Upper East Side, Museum Mile, and Central Park.

While Fifth Avenue has a higher profile as a luxury destination and commands higher retail rents, Park Avenue is known for its exclusive co-ops and condos that can fetch some of the highest prices in the city. Ultimately, the answer to which street is more expensive depends on specific properties and market conditions.
what is the average  price eur/sqm in Castellana neightbourhood in barrio de Salamanca

The Castellana neighborhood is situated in the glamorous Barrio de Salamanca district of Madrid, Spain. It is one of the most exclusive and affluent areas in Madrid, and home to some of the city's most expensive real estate.

The average price per square meter of a property in Castellana neighborhood of Barrio de Salamanca can vary greatly based on specific location, property type, and market conditions. However, according to data from Idealista, a popular real estate website in Spain, the average price per square meter for an apartment in the Castellana neighborhood is approximately €9,912 as of August 2021. 

It is important to note that the prices for luxury properties in Castellana can vary greatly depending on the specific features of a property, such as size, location, age, and amenities available.
